mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 6.0% signals severe labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending capacity and corporate earnings growth, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns remain positive in 60% of instances when UNRATE crosses 6.0%, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio is negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real sales of autos and light trucks combined with stable consumer price inflation indicates robust consumer demand without inflationary pressure, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative Rank IC over any 24-month rolling window, or positive return frequency falls below 50% when both conditions are met.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth during periods of monetary tightening reflects resilient supply-side capacity that supports equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during tightening periods with negative 5-day forward returns in 65% of cases, or regime-specific IC drops below -0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls expand household income and aggregate demand, which translates to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC remains below 0.01 or positive return frequency during payroll growth months falls below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts dropping below 1.4 million units signals a collapse in construction activity and related consumer spending, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are positive in 60% of instances when HOUST crosses the threshold, or out-of-sample t-statistic for return difference is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in the federal funds rate and the unemployment rate indicates an accommodative monetary policy successfully stimulating the labor market, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces a negative Rank IC over any 36-month window, or positive return frequency drops below 48% when both series move in the specified direction.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real GDP growth during periods of stable inflation confirms sustainable economic expansion, which supports corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal yields negative 60-day forward returns in 60% of cases during mid-cycle periods, or rolling Rank IC falls below 0.02.
